prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO11NUBAP-11-BLCK Product Type: WAIST_PACK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 11" Metal Detecting Nylon Utility Belt Pouch Description: Keep your tools handy while gold prospecting with the ASR Outdoor Utility Belt.

This belt comes with 3 pockets, a zipper pouch and a heavy duty buckle. The pouch is constructed of 600 Denier durable nylon and the belt adjusts 38" - 48".

The belt also comes with 2 3" carabiners and an elastic band at the top of the pouch for holding miscellaneous items. It is perfect for holding metal detectors, home improvement or craft tools.

Make sure to grab one of these before your next gold prospecting trip. Search Terms: metal detector accessories unisex mens fanny pack outdoor stream sluiceutility pouch 3 pocket tool belt carrier adjustable Features: - Overall Pouch Size: 11" x 11.5" - Material: 600 Denier Nylon - Belt Adjusts 38" - 48" - Pockets of Various Sizes for Versatility - Color: Black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
